user_bio:
I help brands grow in digital commerce by connecting strategy, architecture, and execution.

As a Partner at Itonomy and Touchwonders, I work at the intersection of business and technology, from digital strategy to solution architecture.

I experiment with and implement AI and workflow automation to help teams move faster, make better decisions, and unlock new growth channels.

Speaker @ Beeckestijn Business School. Topics: AI & Automation • EMERGE App • Magento / Adobe Commerce.
